title: TF2 Heavy sells Kaboom
description: Heavy Weapons Guy wants to get in on some of that sweet infomercial action. The Heavy narrates Billy Mays's Kaboom commercial. Sounds are property of Valve and images property of Billy May's and whoever else has ownership to the Kaboom infomercial.
